Face Presence Analysis

Author

Jeffrey Girard

Published

May 19, 2025

Setup

library(tidyverse)
library(rstan)
library(brms)
library(easystats)
library(ggeffects)
info <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/session_info.rds")
part <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/partface_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info, by = join_by(subject, wave, month))
full <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/fullface_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info, by = join_by(subject, wave, month))

Partial Face Analyses

Partial Face Summary

df_part <- 
  part |> 
  filter(part_duration > 0) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, month),
    sum_part = sum(part_duration),
    pct_part = sum_part / first(session_duration)
  ) |> 
  arrange(subject, wave) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = subject,
    window = row_number()
  ) |> 
  complete(subject, window)
describe_distribution(df_part, select = "pct_part") |> print_md()
Variable Mean SD IQR Range Skewness Kurtosis n n_Missing
pct_part 0.32 0.13 0.18 (0.03, 0.65) 0.22 -0.28 135 41 
ggplot(df_part, aes(x = pct_part)) +
  geom_histogram(na.rm = TRUE, color = "white", breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.025)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Percent of Video with a Partial Face", y = "Video Count")

Partial Face Null Model

part_null <- brm(
  formula = pct_part | mi() ~ 1 + (1 | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_part,
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "part_null",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
variance_decomposition(part_null)
# Random Effect Variances and ICC

Conditioned on: all random effects

## Variance Ratio (comparable to ICC)
Ratio: 0.38  CI 95%: [0.09 0.57]

## Variances of Posterior Predicted Distribution
Conditioned on fixed effects: 0.01  CI 95%: [0.01 0.02]
Conditioned on rand. effects: 0.02  CI 95%: [0.01 0.02]

## Difference in Variances
Difference: 0.01  CI 95%: [0.00 0.01]

Partial Face Linear Time Model

part_linear <- brm(
  formula = pct_part | mi() ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_part,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "part_linear",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(part_linear, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(part_linear, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
(Intercept) -0.91 (-1.17, -0.66) 100% 1.000 1751.00
window 0.05 (-0.03, 0.14) 90.13% 1.000 2064.00
# distributional.fixed
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
phi 18.81 (13.85, 25.13) 100% 1.001 1347.00
# Random Effects Variances
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.50 (0.30, 0.79) 100% 1.003 626.00
SD (window: subject) 0.06 (3.16e-03, 0.17) 100% 1.003 516.00
Cor (Intercept~window: subject) -0.70 (-0.99, 0.72) 84.20% 1.000 1283.00 
plot(
  conditional_effects(
    part_linear, 
    effects = "window", 
    int_conditions = list(window = c(1, 2, 3, 4))
  ), 
  plot = FALSE
)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0.25, 0.40)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Partial Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("ppl_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)

Partial Face Monotonic Time Model

part_monotonic <- brm(
  formula = pct_part | mi() ~ 1 + mo(window) + (1 + mo(window) | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_part,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "part_monotonic",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(part_monotonic, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(part_monotonic, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
(Intercept) -0.84 (-1.03, -0.66) 100% 1.000 1777.00
mowindow 0.04 (-0.04, 0.13) 85.00% 1.001 2168.00
# Monotonic Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
window1[1] 0.31 (0.01, 0.82) 100% 0.999 3790.00
window1[2] 0.27 (0.01, 0.79) 100% 0.999 4229.00
window1[3] 0.32 (0.02, 0.84) 100% 0.999 4242.00
# distributional.fixed
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
phi 18.16 (13.48, 24.36) 100% 1.003 1197.00
# Random Effects Variances
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.42 (0.28, 0.60) 100% 1.004 911.00
SD (mowindow: subject) 0.03 (1.28e-03, 0.12) 100% 1.001 1061.00
Cor (Intercept~mowindow: subject) -0.02 (-0.93, 0.95) 51.27% 0.999 2967.00 
plot(
  conditional_effects(
    part_monotonic, 
    effects = "window", 
    int_conditions = list(window = c(1, 2, 3, 4))
  ), 
  plot = FALSE
)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0.25, 0.40)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Partial Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("ppm_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)

Full Face Analyses

Full Face Summaries

df_full <- 
  full |> 
  filter(full_duration > 0) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, month),
    sum_full = sum(full_duration),
    pct_full = sum_full / first(session_duration)
  ) |> 
  arrange(subject, wave) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = subject,
    window = row_number()
  ) |> 
  complete(subject, window)
describe_distribution(df_full, select = "pct_full") |> print_md()
Variable Mean SD IQR Range Skewness Kurtosis n n_Missing
pct_full 0.04 0.03 0.04 (1.36e-03, 0.17) 1.33 2.16 133 43 
ggplot(df_full, aes(x = pct_full)) +
  geom_histogram(na.rm = TRUE, color = "white", breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.025)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Percent of Video Frames with a Full Face", y = "Video Count")

Full Face Null Model

full_null <- brm(
  formula = pct_full | mi() ~ 1 + (1 | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_full,
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  file = "full_null",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
variance_decomposition(full_null)
# Random Effect Variances and ICC

Conditioned on: all random effects

## Variance Ratio (comparable to ICC)
Ratio: 0.17  CI 95%: [-0.36 0.50]

## Variances of Posterior Predicted Distribution
Conditioned on fixed effects: 0.00  CI 95%: [0.00 0.00]
Conditioned on rand. effects: 0.00  CI 95%: [0.00 0.00]

## Difference in Variances
Difference: 0.00  CI 95%: [-0.00 0.00]

Full Face Linear Time Model

full_linear <- brm(
  formula = pct_full | mi() ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_full,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "full_linear",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(full_linear, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(full_linear, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
(Intercept) -3.44 (-3.73, -3.18) 100% 1.000 2489.00
window 0.10 (3.93e-05, 0.22) 97.50% 1.000 1857.00
# distributional.fixed
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
phi 52.07 (37.47, 71.61) 100% 1.006 859.00
# Random Effects Variances
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.37 (0.06, 0.77) 100% 1.010 528.00
SD (window: subject) 0.06 (3.02e-03, 0.19) 100% 1.011 538.00
Cor (Intercept~window: subject) -0.68 (-0.99, 0.85) 80.10% 1.004 1255.00 
plot(
  conditional_effects(
    full_linear, 
    effects = "window", 
    int_conditions = list(window = c(1, 2, 3, 4))
  ), 
  plot = FALSE
)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0.025, 0.060)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Full Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("pfl_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)

Full Face Monotonic Time Model

full_monotonic <- brm(
  formula = pct_full | mi() ~ 1 + mo(window) + (1 + mo(window) | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_full,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "full_monotonic",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(full_monotonic, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(full_monotonic, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
(Intercept) -3.33 (-3.56, -3.13) 100% 1.001 1994.00
mowindow 0.10 (-0.02, 0.20) 95.07% 1.000 1261.00
# Monotonic Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
window1[1] 0.32 (0.01, 0.83) 100% 1.002 3038.00
window1[2] 0.42 (0.03, 0.88) 100% 1.001 2361.00
window1[3] 0.17 (6.89e-03, 0.72) 100% 1.000 2172.00
# distributional.fixed
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
phi 50.07 (36.97, 69.08) 100% 1.010 594.00
# Random Effects Variances
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.30 (0.06, 0.51) 100% 1.019 356.00
SD (mowindow: subject) 0.04 (1.27e-03, 0.16) 100% 1.015 521.00
Cor (Intercept~mowindow: subject) -0.27 (-0.97, 0.90) 64.77% 1.000 1542.00 
plot(conditional_effects(full_monotonic, effects = "window"), plot = FALSE)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0.025, 0.060)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Full Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("pfm_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
